package rulecoverage

func PositiveStringsCountGtZeroContains() string {
    ruleID := "strings_count_gt_zero_contains"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`strings.Count(...) > 0` instead of `strings.Contains(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
